fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a unique code for the reminder action group.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the reminder action group.

fields.name: Schedule
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cadence of the automation job. The cadence determines how often the automation job is run.

fields.name: Start DateTime
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and time when the automation job is started for the first time.

fields.name: Next Run Date Formula
fields.tooltip: Specifies the formula that is used to calculate the date and time when the automation job is run next time.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the reminder action group is blocked. Blocked reminder action groups cannot be used in the system.
